features: Air Wick Freshmatic Compact Automatic Spray Refill Touch of Luxury Crisp Linen and Lilac 24 ml^Air Wick Freshmatic Compact Automatic Spray Refill Touch of Luxury Crisp Linen and Lilac 24 ml^Air Wick Freshmatic Compact Automatic Spray Refill Touch of Luxury Crisp Linen and Lilac 24 ml
description: Product Description Air Wick Freshmatic Compact Automatic Spray Refill Touch of Luxury Crisp Linen and Lilac 24 ml Ingredients Alcohol Denat, Butane, Propane, Isopropane, Parfum, Isopentane, Butylphenyl Methylpropional, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Citronellol, Citral. Safety Warning Warning: Please read the safety and precautionary text carefully before use. Keep for future reference. Direct device away from face and others, and insert the aerosol refill as shown. Safety/ Allergy Information: People suffering from perfume sensitivity should be cautious when using this product. Air Fresheners do not replace good hygiene practices. Caution: Use only as directed. Intentional misuse by deliberately concentrating & inhaling contents can be harmful or fatal. Keep out of the reach of children. Use only in well ventilated areas. Do not breathe spray. Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. If swallowed, seek medical advice immediately and show this container or label. Harmful to aquatic organisms. May cause long-term adverse effects in the aquatic environment. Pressurised container. Protect from sunlight and do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C. Extremes of temperatures can occur in motor cars and near ovens and fireplaces. Do not place in contact with hot surfaces or naked flames. Do not pierce or burn even after use. Do not spray on a naked flame, and incandescent material (e.g. Candle) or near any electrical appliance in use (e.g. TV). Keep away from sources of ignition. No smoking. Do not allow product spray to settle on surfaces fabrics or food. This material and its container must be disposed in a safe way. Contains: Ethanone, 1-(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8-octahydro-2,3,8,8-tetramethyl-2-naphthalenyl), Limonene, Butylphenyl Methylpropional, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Bourgeonal and Citronellol. May produce an allergic reaction. Extremely Flammable Beware of imitation: Only Air Wick refills will work in the Air Wick Mini Freshmatic device. Solvent Abuse Can Kill Instantly Manufacturer Contact Information Reckitt Benckiser, PO Box 4044, Slough, SL1 0NS, UK. See more
